name: Parametric Insurance Coverage
description: TEE-verified parametric insurance for DeFi positions. Get coverage against smart contract exploits, stablecoin depegs, gas spikes, oracle failures, liquidations, and more. Every resolution is hardware-attested via Phala Network TEE — verify the attestation, don't trust the operator. Powered by dual-auth oracle (Judge + Auditor consensus).

offerings.name: Smart Contract Exploit Coverage
offerings.description: Protection against smart contract hacks and vulnerabilities for DeFi protocols like Aave, Compound, Uniswap, etc.
offerings.priceNote: Base fee $0.50 + premium calculated by risk engine based on coverage amount and duration

protocol.description: Target DeFi protocol (e.g., aave, compound, uniswap)

description.description: Free-text description of what you want covered

offerings.name: Stablecoin Depeg Coverage
offerings.description: Protection against stablecoin depegging events (USDT, USDC, DAI, etc.)

offerings.name: Gas Spike Coverage
offerings.description: Protection against network gas fee spikes above defined thresholds

offerings.name: Oracle Failure Coverage
offerings.description: Protection against price feed failures and oracle manipulation

offerings.name: Liquidation Cascade Coverage
offerings.description: Protection against cascading liquidations on lending protocols

offerings.name: Bridge Exploit Coverage
offerings.description: Protection against cross-chain bridge exploits and failures

naturalLanguage: I need coverage for my 5000 USDC position on Aave against smart contract exploits for 30 days

Protect my LP position on Uniswap against impermanent loss for 14 days
I want gas spike insurance for 7 days with 1000 USDC coverage
